page.title: Marbella Full Moon Yoga Cruise: Stretch, Breathe & Sail Under the Moon

data.meta_description: Join a Marbella full moon yoga cruise from Puerto Banús. Stretch & breathe on deck under the moonlight. Includes skipper, drinks, snacks & 12.5m Astondoa 40. Book now.
data.summary: A unique Marbella full moon yoga cruise combines a sunset sail from Puerto Banús with a guided yoga session on deck. The 12.5m Astondoa 40 accommodates 9 guests, with all drinks, snacks, and skipper included.
key_facts: Departure from Puerto Banús, Marbella – 12.5m Astondoa 40
Includes: licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, IVA
Onboard: yoga mat, guided 45-min session, soft drinks, beer, wine, cava, snacks
Price: €1,199 for up to 9 guests (all inclusive)
Best viewed on clear nights – moon phase calendar provided on booking

faq.q: What is included in the Marbella full moon yoga cruise?
faq.a: The cruise includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, 21% Spanish IVA, a guided 45-minute yoga session with mats, and unlimited soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. You just bring yourself and comfortable clothing.

faq.q: How long does the full moon yoga cruise last?
faq.a: The experience runs for 3 hours, typically departing 30 minutes before sunset to catch the golden hour, then sailing through twilight as the moon rises. Yoga is held on the bow or flybridge, depending on conditions.

faq.q: Which boat is used for the yoga cruise?
faq.a: We use the Astondoa 40, a 12.5-metre motor yacht that departs from Puerto Banús. It has a spacious forward sunpad area ideal for yoga, plus a shaded cockpit for relaxing post-session. Maximum 9 guests.

faq.q: Do I need to be an experienced yogi?
faq.a: Absolutely not. The session is led by a certified instructor and is designed for all levels – from complete beginners to advanced practitioners. Poses are adapted to the gentle movement of the boat.

faq.q: What happens if the weather is bad or the moon is clouded?
faq.a: We monitor forecasts closely. If conditions are unsafe (high winds, thunderstorms), we reschedule or offer a full refund. If clouds obscure the moon but seas are calm, the cruise proceeds with a focus on the meditative atmosphere.

faq.q: Can I bring my own yoga mat?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own mat. We provide high-quality non-slip mats as standard, but if you prefer your own, let us know at booking so we can adjust the setup.

faq.q: Is the cruise private or shared?
faq.a: The cruise is private – your group of up to 9 guests has the boat to yourselves. Perfect for couples, friends, or a solo retreat. No strangers on board.

faq.q: How do I book the Marbella full moon yoga cruise?
faq.a: Book via WhatsApp or our website. We require a 50% deposit to secure the date, with the balance due 7 days before departure. Full moon dates book up quickly – we recommend reserving at least 2 weeks in advance.

data.body_html:
Imagine a Marbella full moon yoga cruise where the only sounds are the gentle lap of the Mediterranean, your breath, and the soft hum of a yacht engine as the moon rises over La Concha. This isn't a studio class – it's a 3-hour private escape from Puerto Banús, combining a sunset sail with a guided yoga session on the bow of a 12.5-metre Astondoa 40. With a maximum of 9 guests, you get space to stretch, breathe, and float under a silver sky. All drinks, snacks, and equipment are included – just bring an open mind.

What to Expect on Your Marbella Full Moon Yoga Cruise

Your evening begins at Puerto Banús, where you board the Astondoa 40 – a 12.5m motor yacht with a spacious forward sunpad and shaded cockpit. As the sun dips behind the Sierra Blanca, your skipper eases out past the superyachts and heads toward the open sea. The 45-minute yoga session is timed to start as the moon crests the horizon, led by a certified instructor who adapts every pose to the gentle roll of the boat. After savasana, you'll enjoy soft drinks, cava, beer, or wine while the moon paints a silver path across the water. The cruise lasts 3 hours total, returning to port under a full moon.

Why a Yoga Cruise Works on the Costa del Sol

Marbella's climate delivers over 300 sunny days per year, and the full moon calendar offers 12–13 prime dates annually. The Mediterranean in the evening is typically calm – light breezes and minimal swell – making it safe and comfortable for yoga on deck. The Astondoa 40's forward deck is large enough for 9 mats side by side, with the flybridge providing shade if needed. Sailing from Puerto Banús, you're minutes from open water and the iconic silhouette of La Concha mountain, which frames every moonrise. This isn't a gimmick – it's a genuinely serene way to experience the coast.

What's Included – Honest Breakdown

  • Boat: Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax)
  • Duration: 3 hours (sunset + moonrise)
  • Yoga: 45-minute guided session with mats
  • Crew: Licensed skipper + certified yoga instructor
  • Drinks: Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
  • Snacks: Light bites (olives, nuts, fruit)
  • Extras: Fuel, insurance, 21% IVA – no hidden fees

Price: €1,199 for the entire boat (up to 9 guests). No per-person upselling.

Which Full Moon Dates to Book

Full moons occur roughly every 29.5 days. The most magical are the supermoons (closer to Earth) and harvest moons (rising just after sunset). We provide a moon phase calendar when you enquire, but popular months – June through September – sell out weeks ahead. The cruise operates from March to November; winter dates are possible on request but depend on sea conditions. Book at least 14 days in advance to secure your preferred date.

How to Prepare for Your Yoga Cruise

  • Wear comfortable, stretchy clothing – layers are smart as evenings cool
  • Bring a light jacket or wrap for the return leg
  • No need for special shoes – barefoot on deck is fine
  • Arrive 15 minutes early to settle in
  • Let us know if you have any injuries or limitations; poses are adaptable
  • Phones on silent – this is a screen-free experience

Compare with Other Marbella Boat Experiences

If a full moon yoga cruise sounds too niche, explore our full fleet of Marbella boat rentals. For larger groups wanting a party vibe, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) includes a free jet ski. Or for a daytime wellness trip, consider a Marbella sunset cruise with cava and snacks. The Astondoa 40 also works for private dinner charters – just ask.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is included in the Marbella full moon yoga cruise?

The cruise includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, 21% Spanish IVA, a guided 45-minute yoga session with mats, and unlimited soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. You just bring yourself and comfortable clothing.

How long does the full moon yoga cruise last?

The experience runs for 3 hours, typically departing 30 minutes before sunset to catch the golden hour, then sailing through twilight as the moon rises. Yoga is held on the bow or flybridge, depending on conditions.

Which boat is used for the yoga cruise?

We use the Astondoa 40, a 12.5-metre motor yacht that departs from Puerto Banús. It has a spacious forward sunpad area ideal for yoga, plus a shaded cockpit for relaxing post-session. Maximum 9 guests.

Do I need to be an experienced yogi?

Absolutely not. The session is led by a certified instructor and is designed for all levels – from complete beginners to advanced practitioners. Poses are adapted to the gentle movement of the boat.

What happens if the weather is bad or the moon is clouded?

We monitor forecasts closely. If conditions are unsafe (high winds, thunderstorms), we reschedule or offer a full refund. If clouds obscure the moon but seas are calm, the cruise proceeds with a focus on the meditative atmosphere.

Can I bring my own yoga mat?

Yes, you are welcome to bring your own mat. We provide high-quality non-slip mats as standard, but if you prefer your own, let us know at booking so we can adjust the setup.

Is the cruise private or shared?

The cruise is private – your group of up to 9 guests has the boat to yourselves. Perfect for couples, friends, or a solo retreat. No strangers on board.

How do I book the Marbella full moon yoga cruise?

Book via WhatsApp or our website. We require a 50% deposit to secure the date, with the balance due 7 days before departure. Full moon dates book up quickly – we recommend reserving at least 2 weeks in advance.
